category_sources: Official FreeType ttfautohint page says it provides automated hinting for web fonts and builds on FreeType auto-hinting.
source_facts.description states this is an auto-hinter for TrueType fonts.
display_name_sources: Official FreeType project page heading is ttfautohint.
docs_sources: Official documentation page covers command-line, GUI, API, options, and background details.
Official ttfautohint page links online documentation.
repo_sources: Official FreeType ttfautohint page says development takes place in a public git repository and links repo.or.cz/ttfautohint.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official ttfautohint page describes FreeType-based hinting for web fonts and command-line/GUI front ends.
